agents.agent_description: Analyzes patient data and symptoms using AI models to assist doctors in diagnosis.
Sends reminders, tracks medication intake, and alerts caregivers in case of missed doses.
Monitors patient vitals (e.g., heart rate, glucose levels) and detects anomalies.
Provides a chatbot interface for patients to ask health-related questions and schedule appointments.
